title: Hubspot MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Hubspot MCP Server for Claude

Access and manage HubSpot CRM data including contacts, companies, and deals

- **Category:** mcp
- **Author:** HubSpot
- **Brand:** HubSpot / hubspot.com
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `crm` `hubspot` `sales` `marketing` `customer-data`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status hubspot
```

## Config
```json
{
  "hubspot": {
    "url": "https://mcp.hubspot.com/anthropic",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status hubspot

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/hubspot-mcp-server
- https://developers.hubspot.com/mcp
